name: KALTURA INC
business: Kaltura provides a cloud-based rich media platform that enables organizations to create, manage, and deliver video and rich media experiences, increasingly incorporating agentic artificial intelligence capabilities. The platform supports customer-facing, employee-facing, learner-facing, and audience-facing use cases, including virtual events, cloud TV, and conversational engagement. Customers include large enterprises, educational institutions, and media and telecom companies across various industries.
sellsTo: Regulated industries (banking, government, healthcare, life sciences)

exposures.sentence: Kaltura's Digital Experience Platform enables organizations to create, manage, and deliver video and rich media experiences that increasingly incorporate agentic artificial intelligence ( AI ) capabilities, including conversational interfaces, workflow automation, and outcome-oriented engagement across digital touchpoints.
Cloud TV Software: This market segment includes cloud-based software systems designed to power large-scale over-the-top ( OTT ) and cloud television services across devices and monetization models.

Through Conversational Rich Media Agents, organizations can engage users through role-based, goal-oriented interactions that incorporate video, audio, text, images, infographics, and other interactive elements.

catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we acquired eSelf AI, a multimodal AI lab developing technology for agentic interactions with live avatars.
In March, 2026, we entered into a definitive agreement to acquire PathFactory, a provider of content journey orchestration and engagement analytics solutions.

In August 2025, our Board of Directors approved a reorganization plan (the 2025 Reorganization Plan) that included, among other things, downsizing approximately 10% of our workforce and adapting our organizational structure, roles, and responsibilities accordingly.

catalysts.event: Stock repurchase agreement with Special Situations Investing Group II, LLC
catalysts.sentence: On November 7, 2025, pursuant to additional repurchase authority approved by the Board, the Company entered into a stock purchase agreement (the 2025 Stock Purchase Agreement ) with Special Situations Investing Group II, LLC (the Sellers ), pursuant to which the Company has repurchased 14,443,739 shares of Common Stock from the Sellers at a purchase price of $16,610,300.
